label: USGS - Large earthquakes by magnitude
query:
SELECT place, mag, time, latitude, longitude
FROM earthquakes
WHERE mag > 4.5
ORDER BY mag DESC
LIMIT 25

label: USGS - Recent California earthquakes
query:
SELECT place, mag, time
FROM earthquakes
WHERE place LIKE '%CA%' AND time > '2023-01-01'
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 20

label: USGS - Shallow earthquake count by region
query:
SELECT place, COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM earthquakes
WHERE depth < 10.0
GROUP BY place
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 15

label: NOAA - High temperature stations
query:
SELECT STATION, DATE, TMP, DEW
FROM weather
WHERE TMP > 30.0
ORDER BY TMP DESC
LIMIT 20

label: NOAA - Average temperature by station
query:
SELECT STATION, AVG(TMP) AS avg_temp, MIN(TMP) AS min_temp, MAX(TMP) AS max_temp
FROM weather
GROUP BY STATION
ORDER BY avg_temp DESC
LIMIT 15

label: NOAA - Days with large pressure drops
query:
SELECT STATION, DATE, SLP
FROM weather
WHERE SLP < 1005.0
ORDER BY SLP ASC
LIMIT 20

label: AWID - Strong signal devices
query:
SELECT wlan_sa, radiotap_dbm_antsignal, class
FROM wifi_network
WHERE radiotap_dbm_antsignal > -50
ORDER BY radiotap_dbm_antsignal DESC
LIMIT 25

label: AWID - Normal traffic by MAC prefix
query:
SELECT SUBSTR(wlan_sa, 1, 8) AS mac_prefix, COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM wifi_network
WHERE class = 'normal'
GROUP BY mac_prefix
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 15

label: AWID - Attack signal distribution
query:
SELECT radiotap_dbm_antsignal, COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM wifi_network
WHERE class = 'attack'
GROUP BY radiotap_dbm_antsignal
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 20

label: Products - Top-selling items
query:
SELECT category, product_name, price, stock_qty
FROM products
WHERE stock_qty > 0
ORDER BY price DESC
LIMIT 30

label: Products - Average price by category
query:
SELECT category, AVG(price) AS avg_price, COUNT(*) AS product_count
FROM products
GROUP BY category
ORDER BY avg_price DESC
LIMIT 20

label: Products - Low stock alerts
query:
SELECT product_name, category, stock_qty
FROM products
WHERE stock_qty < 10
ORDER BY stock_qty ASC
LIMIT 25

label: Orders - High-value recent orders
query:
SELECT order_id, customer_id, total_amount, order_date
FROM orders
WHERE total_amount > 500.0
ORDER BY order_date DESC
LIMIT 30

label: Orders - Monthly revenue summary
query:
SELECT STRFTIME('%Y-%m', order_date) AS month, SUM(total_amount) AS revenue, COUNT(*) AS order_count
FROM orders
GROUP BY month
ORDER BY month DESC
LIMIT 24

label: Orders - Top customers by spend
query:
SELECT customer_id, COUNT(*) AS order_count, SUM(total_amount) AS total_spend
FROM orders
GROUP BY customer_id
ORDER BY total_spend DESC
LIMIT 20

label: Orders - Pending high-value orders
query:
SELECT order_id, customer_id, total_amount
FROM orders
WHERE status = 'pending' AND total_amount > 200.0
ORDER BY total_amount DESC
LIMIT 20

label: USGS - SELECT * variant
query: SELECT * FROM earthquakes WHERE mag > 4.0

label: USGS - Missing predicate (full scan)
query: SELECT place, mag, time FROM earthquakes ORDER BY mag DESC

label: USGS - Non-sargable YEAR() predicate
query: SELECT place, mag, time FROM earthquakes WHERE YEAR(time) = 2024 ORDER BY mag DESC LIMIT 20
expected_issue: Function on indexed column prevents index seek

label: USGS - DISTINCT instead of GROUP BY
query: SELECT DISTINCT place, mag FROM earthquakes ORDER BY mag DESC
expected_issue: DISTINCT used where GROUP BY is more appropriate

label: NOAA - Cross join variant
query:
SELECT w1.STATION, w1.TMP, w2.TMP AS TMP2
FROM weather w1, weather w2

label: NOAA - Missing LIMIT on ordered query
query: SELECT STATION, DATE, TMP FROM weather WHERE TMP > 25.0 ORDER BY TMP DESC
expected_issue: Unbounded result set from missing LIMIT

label: NOAA - Implicit type coercion
query: SELECT STATION, DATE, TMP FROM weather WHERE STATION = 10010099999 AND TMP > 25.0

label: AWID - Nested subquery variant
AWID - OR instead of IN
query:
SELECT wlan_sa, class, radiotap_dbm_antsignal
FROM wifi_network
WHERE class = 'normal' OR class = 'attack' OR class = 'unknown'
ORDER BY radiotap_dbm_antsignal
expected_issue: Multiple OR conditions instead of IN list

label: AWID - LIKE with leading wildcard
query: SELECT wlan_sa, class FROM wifi_network WHERE wlan_sa LIKE '%:ff'

label: Products - SELECT * with full scan
query: SELECT * FROM products

label: Products - Missing GROUP BY column
query: SELECT product_name, category, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM products GROUP BY category
expected_issue: GROUP BY does not include all non-aggregate columns

label: Products - Non-sargable string function
query: SELECT product_name, price, category FROM products WHERE LOWER(category) = 'electronics' ORDER BY price DESC LIMIT 20
expected_issue: Function on indexed column prevents index seek

label: Orders - UNION instead of UNION ALL
query:
SELECT order_id, total_amount FROM orders WHERE status = 'pending'
UNION
SELECT order_id, total_amount FROM orders WHERE status = 'shipped'
ORDER BY total_amount DESC LIMIT 30
expected_issue: UNION instead of UNION ALL (no duplicate removal needed)

label: Orders - Redundant subquery wrapping
query:
SELECT * FROM (
    SELECT order_id, customer_id, total_amount, order_date
    FROM orders WHERE total_amount > 100.0
) AS t WHERE total_amount > 200.0

label: Orders - Missing LIMIT with ORDER BY
query: SELECT order_id, customer_id, total_amount FROM orders ORDER BY total_amount DESC
expected_issue: Unbounded result set from missing LIMIT
